default.tagline: +1 & +2 Science Coaching for Physics, Chemistry & Mathematics

hero.title: ഉറപ്പിക്കാം A+ അനന്ദൂസിനൊപ്പം
hero.subtitle: Focused coaching for +1 & +2 students in Physics, Chemistry, and Mathematics. Build strong concepts, solve faster, and score higher in board exams.

preview.title: Strong Basics. Top Scores.
preview.description: We focus on deep conceptual understanding, regular tests, and exam-oriented problem solving. Our structured approach ensures students perform confidently in board exams and entrance preparations.

reviews.text: Physics and Maths became much easier after joining here. Concepts are explained very clearly.
